channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: XRP jumps 3% above $1.14 as institutional buying meets key resistance test
item.description: XRP posted its strongest session in days on a sharp volume surge, though traders remain focused on whether the rally can break a longer-term downtrend that still points lower.

item.title: Live updates: Bitcoin in volatile trading above $63,000, DOGE unchanged
item.description: Crypto firmed across the board on the largest listing in history, but the token most tied to Elon Musk traded right in line with the market.

item.title: Former SEC, CFTC Chair Gary Gensler argues that prediction markets don't overrule state regulations
item.description: The former regulator joined a number of interest groups in arguing that prediction markets are overstepping their bounds by offering sports-related contracts.

item.title: SpaceX's crypto-traded IPO was sharply falling. It now points upward to a $2.4 trillion valuation
item.description: The SPCX perpetual on Hyperliquid has bounced from this week’s lows, while Bloomberg says other shadow markets now imply a first-day gain of more than 35%.

item.title: The company that makes your TV is taking ads onchain. Arbitrum helped
item.description: LG Electronics has built a blockchain-based advertising platform with the help of Arbitrum.

item.title: Bitcoin climbs back into the green as Trump signals an end to the Iran war
item.description: A de-escalation in the Iran conflict pulled oil lower and sent global stocks higher, lifting crypto out of a wildly volatile seven days.

item.title: LG, Arbitrum launch blockchain-based bid for $679B ad market
item.description: LG is building a blockchain focused on buying and selling ads, joining a wave of companies launching their own blockchains in recent years.

item.title: Coinbase launches tool letting AI agents make payments and trade crypto
item.description: Coinbase for Agents will let users of the crypto exchange manage their holdings “without the constant manual oversight” and can autonomously perform a range of tasks.

item.title: Avalanche Treasury Co. falls 16% as it debuts on Nasdaq
item.description: The Avalanche Treasury holds about 15 million of the blockchain’s native token, AVAX, which is trading at a five-year low.

item.title: "Never sell your Bitcoin," @saylor said. Not "our company will never sell Bitcoin." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBsWHM1WDN5MlgzX09hMVVoMWZNVzJmS0g0ZFBNQUt1WDc0V2VWMDBoSy1TNUdXVmhVVkVLTjBadUVyY3cxYmFyQlNyN0VkdDhfSHA2OV9Od1NwRW1jSXNWdmp3?oc=5" target="_blank">"Never sell your Bitcoin," @saylor…

item.title: Big Tech crash, oil volatility rattles markets: Will Bitcoin hold above $60K?
item.description: With $1.9 billion exiting the spot Bitcoin ETFs and tech stocks under pressure, BTC is failing as a hedge and at risk of falling below the $60,000 support.

item.title: OpenAI Wants a Price War With Anthropic—Is It Proving DeepSeek Right?
item.description: Sam Altman is weighing drastic token price cuts to fight Anthropic. The problem is DeepSeek already made that argument for him—and for free.

item.title: Bitcoin Must Prepare for Quantum Threat Now, Coinbase Says
item.description: Coinbase's quantum advisory council says crypto developers should begin post-quantum migration work now, warning that unresolved questions around abandoned and vulnerable coins could become one of Bitcoin's biggest battles.

item.title: JUST IN: $14 trillion BlackRock files 8-A form for its Bitcoin Premium Income ETF, which "typically means launch in one week", according to Bloomberg's Eric Balchunas 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFAwUFEwYzNEb3NrbkU2UHJ1b2RKbEpXQm5YcVBubFdSQzBuUDROWktaUDN1ZGVlVV92U2YzYjZQaXQzaDV0cXFWSURiSTBjTmkxeEtGMHF3Tm5jU0RjTERjOXVwU2pmTFU?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $14 trillion Black…

item.title: BlackRock filed an 8-A for the Bitcoin Premium Income ETF $BITA. That typically means launch in one week. So if I had to bet I'd say next Thur $BITA goes live. We'll see tho. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE96aTlueEtQbG5vbmtWNWc0SV82cFZzcUdJT2Q3TklHX0JycUZlVlNqbWFvdms2cGZ5aEhyS2FHdEE5ZGJVdGEwMDJoTzJZYlRlUWNWRHdMejhpTkV4ODJOQXRSQ1I?oc=5" target="_blank">BlackRock filed an 8-A for the …

item.title: Citi launches blockchain marketplace for private companies shares: Report
item.description: The US banking giant's blockchain marketplace will offer tokenized depositary receipts of private company shares amid Wall Street's broad embrace of tokenized assets.

item.title: Ripple CEO Takes Aim at JPMorgan's Jamie Dimon Over Clarity Act Crypto Bill Criticism
item.description: Ripple's Brad Garlinghouse spoke out against JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon and his comments on the key piece of crypto legislation.

item.title: Microsoft President Asks Graduates to Stop Fearing AI and Start Adapting
item.description: Brad Smith published a 3,000-word essay urging empathy for graduates booing AI at commencements. The same week, Microsoft's CFO confirmed headcount will keep shrinking.

item.title: Nasdaq-Listed Bitcoin Firm Nakamoto Sells BTC, Cuts Debt and Authorizes Share Buyback
item.description: Nakamoto, the Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin services and treasury firm, sold about $48 million worth of BTC and derivatives to help reduce debt.

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX prices shares at $135, raising $75 billion in largest-ever IPO
item.description: The company's fully diluted value will be about $1.8 trillion, with the stock set to open for trade on Friday on the Nasdaq.

item.title: Global Law Enforcement Dismantles ‘AudiA6’ Crypto Laundering Network Linked to Ransomware Gangs
item.description: Summary An international coalition of law enforcement agencies, including the U.S. DOJ, Secret Service, Europol, CBZC, and others, dismantled “AudiA6,”… The post Global Law Enforcement Dismantles ‘AudiA6’ Crypto Laundering Network Linked t…

item.title: ETH futures traders lean into $1.6K range lows: Will Ether lead market recovery?
item.description: ETH traders increased their long positions as Ether price traded near 2026 lows. Will ETH’s rebound eclipse the BTC recovery?

item.title: Coinbase Launches Tool That Lets AI Agents Trade Crypto and Make Payments for Users
item.description: Coinbase's new product allows AI agents to execute crypto trades, payments, and portfolio management tasks within user-defined limits.

item.title: Crypto Platforms Broaden Access to Elon Musk's SpaceX Ahead of $1.75 Trillion IPO
item.description: With the help of crypto rails, retail investors have a variety of ways to bypass traditional Wall Street gatekeepers to get SpaceX exposure.

item.title: Anthropic Apologizes for Claude Fable 5 Secret Censorship—But the Fix Has a Catch
item.description: One day after the AI community erupted over invisible performance sabotage, Anthropic reversed course. Visible safeguards are coming—and so are more false positives.

item.title: Three signs that XRP price risks falling below $1 in June
item.description: XRP is forming head-and-shoulders and bear flag setups on its shorter-timeframe chart, both indicating a dip below $1 in the coming days.

item.title: Whistleblower Sues Elon Musk's xAI, Claiming He Was Fired After Raising Grok Safety Concerns
item.description: Devin Kim alleged he was terminated after repeatedly warning about bias, misinformation, and dangerous outputs from Elon Musk's Grok chatbot.

item.title: Coinbase eyes World Cup boost as prediction markets surge: Bernstein
item.description: Bernstein says the 2026 FIFA World Cup could inject billions into prediction markets, with Coinbase and Robinhood positioned to capture a wave of new users.

item.title: JUST IN: Coinbase now allows AI agents to trade crypto autonomously. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1wS3dFQlNjNzBmMnR6WUpMWlJyUnp5WmplQXFMdjBXOXRwWDBOMVExMU1mZTNiLWktTzJlc3plLURTVzlXa2QzWkppUzJzQ2R1cy1nQk5VbnBzczJUVFRpRWd3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Coinbase now allows AI ag…

item.title: Coinbase launches AI agent accounts that can trade and spend on your behalf
item.description: "Coinbase for Agents" is a new platform that lets AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude connect to users’ Coinbase accounts to trade crypto, access data and eventually make payments and purchases autonomously.

item.title: Authorities Take Down 'AudiA6' Group That Allegedly Laundered $389 Million in Bitcoin
item.description: Authorities are seeking extradition to the U.S. of two arrested individuals for allegedly laundering $389 million in Bitcoin.

item.title: Banking rails are moving past the 'stablecoin winner' narrative: Sygnum
item.description: Digital asset bank Sygnum says institutional clients want multiple tokenized cash instruments operating interchangeably on a single platform.

item.title: World Cup Could Bring Billions in Volume to Prediction Markets in 'Watershed Moment': Bernstein
item.description: The 48-team FIFA World Cup tournament is expected to be the single largest catalyst for online sports betting in history, Bernstein said.

item.title: MassPay taps Coinbase to expand stablecoin payouts
item.description: MassPay taps Coinbase to add USDC-powered cross-border payouts, betting stablecoin rails will cut costs and speed up settlement for businesses paying globally.

item.title: Wall Street Giants, Sovereign Wealth Fund Back Canton Network Creator in $355M Round
item.description: Canton Network creator Digital Asset secured $355 million in a funding round led by Andreessen Horowitz alongside an array of other backers.

item.title: Banks Say Stablecoin Rules Should Cover Secondary Markets
item.description: Banking industry trade groups argue AML rules should focus on higher-risk activity while addressing gaps in stablecoin secondary markets.

item.title: Franklin Templeton, BNP Paribas see tokenization boosting EU's capital efficiency
item.description: Executives from Franklin Templeton and BNP Paribas say tokenized assets and stablecoins could improve capital efficiency across Europe as Wall Street expands tokenization efforts.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Crypto ETFs
item.description: Global crypto ETFs saw significant outflows in May, but diversified exposures showed relative resilience; we explore what the data signals for long-term investors.

item.title: SPACEX MAY BE TREATING BITCOIN AS A STRATEGIC RESERVE 🔥 According to Bloomberg, @SpaceX’s S-1 IPO filing suggests its Bitcoin holdings may be held as a “strategic reserve for excess cash.” The company has held 18,712 $BTC since 2024, bou - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9DNjBTUVJEa2ctdkxSX3FvOV9KMGlwWC1nN01GeXRDNVZOX1E5SHRqT0NhTVBzUUlmVTF0bFlBSUViYWJYSG5wNHFOMlhEWS16ckZfd1RuYXpNczdLRVpfRDhn?oc=5" target="_blank">SPACEX MAY BE TREATING BITCOIN AS …

item.title: U.S. House bill would erect crypto-theft task force across law enforcement agencies
item.description: New legislation from a bipartisan duo would set up a multi-agency group under the U.S. attorney general to take a lead on cryptocurrency theft cases.

item.title: JUST IN: Hungary to decriminalize Bitcoin and crypto trading, Bloomberg reports 🇭🇺 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE4xeTdEUl9uWFRCYjlPNGpvSHcyZTlRRkpMUXV6Z24tWFhkVTVLWG1Hc09Sdm1QaEMtcjVWaFIyeGRtb3VHYm9INFdHSTRKYndoQ3ZRWkxHaC03c3E3VjN5UnA3aHA1WW8?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Hungary to decrimi…

item.title: SpaceX stock is coming to Solana on the same day it lists on Nasdaq
item.description: The firms making that possible say eligible shares can also be converted back into tokens, creating a bridge between traditional brokerage accounts and blockchain-based markets.

item.title: Canton Network Developer Digital Asset Raises $355 Million Led by a16z Crypto Digital Asset, the developer of privacy-focused blockchain Canton Network, announced the completion of a $355 million funding round at a $2 billion valuation. The round was le - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5UWFQwc1ZpbUZGa2lkbkFVdHJuWGRZMzVyNC1TTnZCU3hhNWVQeWJOZTFfX19HME9EaHJsd0tNT1J5eUoxbnJDMEVTTzBqdGRnbE1DNThJYW5LM3VNZjQyUFlncw?oc=5" target="_blank">Canton Network Developer Digital…

item.title: Canton Network developer raises $355 million to bring Wall Street onchain
item.description: The investment comes as blockchains designed for big banks and institutions are having a moment, with Stripe's Tempo and Circle's Arc raising hundreds of millions of dollars.

item.title: Tether leads $1.4 billion funding round in German robotics company Neura
item.description: The investment is part of the stablecoin giant’s expansion into industries outside of crypto.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI) gains 4.5% as all constituents rise
item.description: Solana (SOL), up 2.6% from Wednesday, was also a top performer.

item.title: Bitcoin tags $63.2K as BTC price action ignores inflation, Iran Hormuz closure
item.description: Bitcoin mostly preserved a recent rebound despite the highest US PPI inflation since October 2022 and Iran closing the Strait of Hormuz oil route.

item.title: Citi opens new route into private markets with tokenized share offering
item.description: The bank said it is using blockchain technology to connect investors with private company equity through digital depositary receipts.

item.title: Digital Asset lands $355M as a16z doubles down on Wall Street blockchain rails
item.description: Digital Asset raised $355M in an a16z‑led round at a $2B valuation, extending a Wall Street‑backed funding run as banks ramp up pilots on its Canton Network blockchain.

item.title: Ondo Finance hires former Invesco ETF chief to build onchain investment products
item.description: John Hoffman will spearhead Ondo's expansion from tokenizing individual assets to full investment portfolios and strategies.

item.title: Hungary to reverse crypto trading crackdown after EU scrutiny
item.description: Hungary’s government said it will unwind crypto trading restrictions that required approved validation for conversions and exposed users and service providers to criminal liability.

item.title: It's not SpaceX. Bitcoin ETF outflows may be an arbitrage story
item.description: While some analysts argue investors are selling bitcoin to free up capital for anticipated IPOs such as SpaceX and Anthropic, Sygnum's Fabian Dori says market data points elsewhere.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Shed $2.1B in June So Far as Market Selloff Deepens
item.description: The pace of outflows from U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs has “moderated,” with analysts assessing whether selling pressure is exhausting.

item.title: Japan crypto bill advances with ETF, tax reform path: Report
item.description: Japan’s Lower House reportedly passed a bill that would bring crypto under the country’s financial instruments framework, potentially opening the door to ETFs and lower tax treatment.

item.title: Audiera’s AI token BEAT beats Bitcoin, Ethereum as price surges 1,500% in a month
item.description: BEAT has reached its most overbought readings on record, raising the odds of a 35% price decline in the coming days.

item.title: AI models led to a ‘vulnerability apocalypse’ in crypto security: Immunefi CEO
item.description: The proliferation of new frontier AI models is the main catalyst behind the latest resurgence in DeFi hacks, according to Immunefi CEO Mitchell Amador.

item.title: Morning Minute: Citadel Cautions Against the AI Trade Ahead of SpaceX IPO
item.description: Citadel says the AI boom may be running into a cost wall, and Tether just led a $1.4B round into humanoid robotics.

item.title: Michael Saylor and Jack Mallers go toe-to-toe over Strategy's bitcoin reporting metrics
item.description: The two bitcoin treasury leaders renewed the debate over Strategy's mNAV and dilution, with Saylor arguing that equity issuance for cash strengthens, rather than dilutes, shareholders.

item.title: ⚡️ INSIGHT: Vitalik says Ethereum builders are already exploring index-tracking assets built on options instead of debt. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5BTi00MVNrVWZjQW9TZWNPQ2ZpRTUxVDByR0FIUFdpOF9aNWlHNjU3bUNoZ2lwYzh5cE90cXZVMzVDYlRGUFlsS1FaUzdGMEN1d3VuNWtscFdlem9PNkJOX051UFE?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ INSIGHT: Vitalik says Ethere…

item.title: IMF Urges Nepal Monitor Crypto as Usage Rises Despite Ban
item.description: The warning echoes the IMF's concerns over crypto adoption, including previous clashes with El Salvador over Bitcoin accumulation.
